testcase.name: test_project_home_GET

failure.message: AssertionError: No templates used to render the response

testcase.failure:
self = <app.tests.test_views.TestView testMethod=test_project_home_GET>
def test_project_home_GET(self): client = Client() url = reverse('website-home') response = client.get(url)
self.assertEquals(response.status_code, 200) #self.client.login(username='Sangu', password='123') print(response.template_name) > self.assertTemplateUsed(response, 'app/index.html')
app\tests\test_views.py:29: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ env1\lib\site-packages\django\test\testcases.py:849: in assertTemplateUsed self._assert_template_used(template_name, template_names, msg_prefix, count) env1\lib\site-packages\django\test\testcases.py:813: in _assert_template_used self.fail(msg_prefix + "No templates used to render the response") E AssertionError: No templates used to render the response

testcase.name: test_project_postdetail_GET

failure.message: AssertionError: No templates used to render the response

testcase.failure:
self = <app.tests.test_views.TestView testMethod=test_project_postdetail_GET>
def test_project_postdetail_GET(self): client = Client() url = reverse('post-detail', args='1') response = client.get(url)
self.assertEquals(response.status_code, 200) #self.client.login(username='Sangu', password='123') print(response.template_name) > self.assertTemplateUsed(response, 'app/post_detail.html')
app\tests\test_views.py:39: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ env1\lib\site-packages\django\test\testcases.py:849: in assertTemplateUsed self._assert_template_used(template_name, template_names, msg_prefix, count) env1\lib\site-packages\django\test\testcases.py:813: in _assert_template_used self.fail(msg_prefix + "No templates used to render the response") E AssertionError: No templates used to render the response
